description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a detached garage connected by a covered walkway. The main building features large, arched windows on the upper floor and a flat roof, while the garage has a gable roof and an open door revealing a parked car. The driveway is wide and leads directly to the garage, bordered by a paved path and a small entry area. The house exterior is finished in light gray tones, with a mix of glass and concrete materials. The windows are arranged in a prominent, symmetrical fashion on the front facade, and the entryway is set back between the garage and the main building. The overall design is clean and geometric, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat-roofed main building, large arched windows, and a detached gable-roof garage connected by a covered walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, open garage with a car, covered walkway, and the main house with large arched windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall of the house, small window, and the length of the driveway and garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house and garage, with visible glass doors and the gable roof of the garage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage's side, the entry path, and the flat side of the main house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway between garage and main house, accessed via a paved path, minimal decorative elements
